title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings for running Llama 2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally on macOS, Linux and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: PyPI package providing the official Python client for Ollama; install with pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official npm package: JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama REST API in Node & browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that wraps Ollama for chat, LLM, and embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multimodal, RAG, user roles) installable via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama; provides ergonomic Rust types and Tokio based client.

title: ollama-copilot (rubentd/ollama-copilot)
summary: Browser extension that turns GitHub Copilot chat into a frontend for your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-chat (sugarforever/ollama-chat)
summary: Minimal Next.js chat UI that connects to Ollama via the REST API; deploy with Vercel in one click.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Lightweight RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB for document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that forwards user prompts to a local Ollama instance and streams replies in chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and optional web-ui sidecar.

title: ollama-tools (joshpxyne/ollama-tools)
summary: Experimental TypeScript package that adds function-calling/tool-use support on top of Ollama chat.

title: ollama-gui (ollama/ollama-gui)
summary: Official lightweight Tauri desktop app wrapping Ollama for macOS/Windows/Linux with native menus.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container plus sidecar for CI-based LLM testing.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama written in Go; supports threads, streaming, and model switching.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot using python-telegram-bot that chats with your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-cli (naklecha/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced Go CLI for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds an Ollama chat sidebar and code-completion provider using local models.
